tools.name: get_rules
tools.description: Get full content of test writing rules. Two modes: (1) by ID — pass ids with comma-separated rule IDs; (2) by filter — pass metadata filters to retrieve all matching rules. Returns the complete markdown body including detection patterns, examples, and fix guidance for each rule.

ids.description: Comma-separated rule IDs. Examples: 'DESIGN-001,CONV-003'. When provided, filter parameters are ignored.

group.description: Filter by rule group. Only used when ids is not provided.

test_type.description: Filter by test type. Excludes unit-only rules when set to 'integration' or 'migration'. Only used when ids is not provided.

test_category.description: Only rules applicable to this test category. Only used when ids is not provided.

scope.description: Only rules with this scope tag. Only used when ids is not provided.

enforce.description: Only rules at this enforcement level. Only used when ids is not provided.

scoped_review.description: When true, excludes rules with class-scope-only=true (for method-scoped reviews). When false or omitted, returns all rules. Only used when ids is not provided.
